description: Curated subset for Try-On Visualization and Guardrail agent testing. 16 items covering men's/women's tops, bottoms, outerwear, and one sports bra. Accessories and one-pieces excluded.

items.name: Gymshark Crest T-Shirt - Black
items.description: Regular-fit cotton-blend tee with the signature embroidered Crest shark logo. An everyday staple.
items.selection_reason: Basic solid top — happy-path try-on baseline

items.name: Gymshark Geo Seamless T-Shirt - Black/Charcoal Grey
items.description: Seamless knit tee with body-mapped ventilation zones for breathable, second-skin training.
items.selection_reason: Pattern/texture item — guardrail fidelity stress test

items.name: Gymshark Critical Tank - Black
items.description: Classic lifting tank with dropped armholes for full range of motion.

items.name: Gymshark Arrival Long Sleeve T-Shirt - Black
items.description: Lightweight long-sleeve training top with a slim fit and sweat-wicking fabric.
items.selection_reason: Long-sleeve layer for multi-piece outfit tests

items.name: Gymshark Arrival 5" Shorts - Black
items.description: Lightweight 5-inch training shorts with quick-dry fabric and a secure fit.

items.name: Gymshark Crest Joggers - Black
items.description: Tapered cotton-blend joggers with cuffed ankles and embroidered Crest logo.

items.name: Gymshark Crest Hoodie - Black
items.description: Cotton-blend pullover hoodie with embroidered Crest logo and kangaroo pocket.

items.name: Gymshark Vital Crop Top - Black Marl
items.description: Short-sleeve seamless crop top in marl knit. Pairs with the Vital set.
items.selection_reason: Women's crop top — coordinates with Vital leggings

items.name: Gymshark Vital Seamless 2.0 Light T-Shirt - Black Marl
items.description: Lightweight seamless tee in soft marl knit for breathable everyday training.
items.selection_reason: Marl texture top — subtle pattern guardrail test

items.name: Gymshark Adapt Fleck Seamless Long Sleeve Crop Top - Mineral | Black
items.description: Fleck-knit seamless long-sleeve crop to complete the Adapt set.
items.selection_reason: Multi-tone fleck pattern — color fidelity stress test

items.name: Gymshark Ruched Sports Bra - Black
items.description: Medium-support sports bra with flattering ruched detail. A perennial best-seller.
items.selection_reason: Sports bra category — different garment type for try-on

items.name: Gymshark Vital Seamless 2.0 Leggings - Black Marl
items.description: Mid-rise seamless leggings in soft marl knit. One of Gymshark's all-time best-sellers.

items.name: Gymshark Adapt Fleck x Whitney Leggings - Mineral/Black
items.description: Fleck-knit seamless leggings with an invisible bum scrunch. A community favourite.
items.selection_reason: Pairs with Adapt fleck top — coordinated set test

items.name: Gymshark Vital Seamless Shorts - Black Marl
items.description: Seamless cycling-length shorts in soft marl knit. A best-selling warm-weather pick.

items.name: Gymshark Legacy Regular Leggings - Black
items.description: High-waisted logo leggings with a firm, squat-proof hold.
items.selection_reason: Solid black leggings — contrast with marl/fleck items

items.name: Gymshark Vital Seamless Midi Zip 2.0 Pullover - Black Marl
items.description: Seamless half-zip pullover with thumbholes to layer over the Vital set.
items.selection_reason: Women's outerwear layer — three-piece outfit test
